name: Discord
description: Send, edit, and delete messages via Discord webhooks and bot API
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The Discord API action to perform.

content.label: Content
content.description: Message content. Used by: Send Webhook Message, Send Channel Message, Edit Message.

username.label: Username
username.description: Override webhook username. Used by: Send Webhook Message.

avatarUrl.label: Avatar URL
avatarUrl.description: Override webhook avatar URL. Used by: Send Webhook Message.

webhookUrl.label: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Discord webhook URL. Used by: Send Webhook Message.

channelId.label: Channel ID
channelId.description: Discord channel ID. Used by: Send Channel Message, Edit Message, Delete Message.

messageId.label: Message ID
messageId.description: Discord message ID. Used by: Edit Message, Delete Message.

botToken.label: Bot Token
botToken.description: Discord bot token. Used by: Send Channel Message, Edit Message, Delete Message.
